### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Cookie: REDACTED
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.12
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Streaming: true
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Fs-Client-Key: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/fixture_gen.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 13
}
```

```
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Fri\, 06 Mar 2026 01:15:44 GMT
Set-Cookie: REDACTED
Vary: Origin
```

http:requestBodyJSON is {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "netprof/cli/fixture_gen.py", "3:LEN": "\"\"\"Generate deterministic synthetic PCAP fixtures using scapy and h2.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom pathlib import Path\r\n\r\n# Deterministic IPs/ports for fixtures\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_IP = \"192.168.1.100\"\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_IP = \"192.168.1.1\"\r\nFIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT = 45000\r\nFIXTURE_SERVER_PORT = 80\r\nINITIAL_CLIENT_ISN = 1000\r\nINITIAL_SERVER_ISN = 2000\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _get_scapy():\r\n    try:\r\n        from scapy.all import Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n        return Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap\r\n    except ImportError:\r\n        raise ImportError(\"scapy is required for fixture generation (pip install scapy)\")\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http1_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http1_keepalive.pcap: one TCP flow with 2 HTTP/1.1 requests (keep-alive).\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"A\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # Request 1\r\n    req1 = (\r\n        b\"GET /first HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 1\r\n    resp1 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"hello\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp1)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp1)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Request 2\r\n    req2 = (\r\n        b\"GET /second HTTP/1.1\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Host: example.com\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(req2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(req2)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # Response 2\r\n    resp2 = (\r\n        b\"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"Content-Length: 5\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"\\r\\n\"\r\n        b\"world\"\r\n    )\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(resp2)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += len(resp2)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN from server\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    # FIN-ACK from client\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"FA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef generate_http2_pcap(path: Path) -> None:\r\n    \"\"\"Create http2_minimal.pcap: one TCP flow with HTTP/2 client preface and minimal SETTINGS + HEADERS + DATA.\"\"\"\r\n    Ether, IP, TCP, Raw, wrpcap = _get_scapy()\r\n    # Build HTTP/2 bytes: preface + SETTINGS (empty) + HEADERS (minimal request) + DATA\r\n    preface = b\"PRI * HTTP/2.0\\r\\n\\r\\nSM\\r\\n\\r\\n\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=True)\r\n        conn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        conn.initiate_connection()\r\n        data_to_send = conn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Request: GET / HTTP/2\r\n        stream_id = conn.get_next_available_stream_id()\r\n        conn.send_headers(stream_id, [(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")], end_stream=True)\r\n        data_to_send += conn.data_to_send()\r\n        client_bytes = preface + data_to_send\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        # Fallback: minimal manual framing (SETTINGS frame type=4, length=0, stream_id=0)\r\n        # 9-byte header: 3 bytes length (0), 1 type (4), 1 flags (0), 4 stream_id (0)\r\n        settings_frame = bytes([0, 0, 0, 4, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0])\r\n        # HEADERS frame for stream 1: type=1, need to HPACK-encode :method GET, :path /\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":method\", \"GET\"), (\":path\", \"/\"), (\":scheme\", \"https\"), (\":authority\", \"example.com\")])\r\n        # Frame: length=len(encoded), type=1, flags=5 (END_HEADERS|END_STREAM), stream_id=1\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 5, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        client_bytes = preface + settings_frame + headers_frame\r\n    # Server: SETTINGS ack, HEADERS response :status 200, DATA \"ok\"\r\n    try:\r\n        import h2.connection\r\n        import h2.config\r\n        config = h2.config.H2Configuration(client_side=False)\r\n        sconn = h2.connection.H2Connection(config=config)\r\n        sconn.initiate_connection()\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n        # Receive client data (preface + frames) to update state\r\n        sconn.receive_data(client_bytes[len(preface):])\r\n        # Send response\r\n        sconn.send_headers(1, [(\":status\", \"200\")], end_headers=True)\r\n        sconn.send_data(1, b\"ok\", end_stream=True)\r\n        server_bytes = sconn.data_to_send()\r\n    except Exception:\r\n        import hpack\r\n        encoder = hpack.Encoder()\r\n        encoded = encoder.encode([(\":status\", \"200\")])\r\n        length = len(encoded)\r\n        headers_frame = bytes([(length >> 16) & 0xFF, (length >> 8) & 0xFF, length & 0xFF, 1, 4, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + encoded\r\n        data_frame = bytes([0, 0, 2, 0, 1, 0, 0, 0, 1]) + b\"ok\"  # length=2, type=0, flags=1 (END_STREAM)\r\n        server_bytes = headers_frame + data_frame\r\n    # Build TCP session with scapy\r\n    packets = []\r\n    ts = 1000000.0\r\n    client_isn = INITIAL_CLIENT_ISN\r\n    server_isn = INITIAL_SERVER_ISN\r\n    # SYN\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"S\", seq=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    client_isn += 1\r\n    # SYN-ACK\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"SA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    )\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    ts += 0.01\r\n    server_isn += 1\r\n    # ACK + client bytes (preface + frames)\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP, dst=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=client_isn, ack=server_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(client_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    client_isn += len(client_bytes)\r\n    ts += 0.02\r\n    # ACK from server (optional) + server bytes\r\n    p = Ether() / IP(src=FIXTURE_SERVER_IP, dst=FIXTURE_CLIENT_IP) / TCP(\r\n        sport=FIXTURE_SERVER_PORT, dport=FIXTURE_CLIENT_PORT, flags=\"PA\", seq=server_isn, ack=client_isn\r\n    ) / Raw(server_bytes)\r\n    p.time = ts\r\n    packets.append(p)\r\n    wrpcap(str(path), packets)\r\n", "4:VARINT": 13}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.FileSyncService/FSUploadFile
```

### METADATA ###
```
direction: OUT
uuid: REDACTED
